LMNR.settings.skillDicePool.name: Dice Pool Skill Resolution
LMNR.settings.skillDicePool.hint: When enabled, skill checks will roll a number of d6 equal to the skill rank instead of a single d20.
LMNR.card.heading: Skill Check
LMNR.display.itemReadoutTooltip: Skill trigger contributes +{rank}d6 to the dice pool (the base 1d6 is implicit).
